result.summary: Found several visual issues, mostly related to horizontal overflow/clipping and fixed navigation overlapping content on the mobile layout.

issues.description: Game cards in multiple sections extend past the right edge of the screen, leaving the third column visibly cut off.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the mobile layout to fit the viewport, such as using two columns, a properly configured horizontal carousel with snapping, or adding clear spacing and scroll affordance.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game grid content near the bottom of the screen, partially covering the lower row of cards.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding or safe-area spacing to the page content so scrollable content is not hidden behind the fixed navigation bar.

issues.description: The top category pill navigation is clipped on the right, with the 'Hot Games' item only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the horizontal category menu has proper scroll behavior, padding, and visual affordance, or reduce item widths so items do not appear accidentally cut off.

issues.description: The hero carousel arrow controls are very close to the screen edges and partially blend into the banner imagery.
issues.suggestion: Add more inset spacing or a stronger control background to make carousel controls feel intentional and easier to tap.
